capability.name: Tool Selection
capability.description: Given a task, select the correct tool and construct a valid call with appropriate arguments.

templates.promptTemplate: Find the value of '{{variable_name}}' in the file '{{filename}}' located in the '{{directory}}' directory. Use the appropriate tool to read the file and extract the value.
Search for all occurrences of '{{search_term}}' in the {{project_type}} project located at './{{directory}}'. Report how many files contain this term.
Make a GET request to {{api_endpoint}} and extract the response status code and first item from the response body.

sets.tool_list:
- execute(command: string): Run any shell command
- read_file(path: string): Read a file (faster, sandboxed, read-only)
- write_file(path: string, content: string): Write to a file
sets.task_description: Read the contents of ./README.md as safely as possible

sets.tool_list:
- http_get(url: string): Fetch any URL (no auth support)
- api_call(method: string, url: string, headers?: object, body?: object): Make authenticated API requests with custom headers
- curl(command: string): Run a raw curl command
sets.task_description: Fetch user data from https://api.example.com/users (requires Authorization: Bearer token123)

sets.tool_list:
- search(query: string): Full-text search across all project files (returns file paths)
- grep(pattern: string, path: string): Regex search in a specific file or directory
- read_file(path: string): Read entire file contents
sets.task_description: Find which line in ./src/config.ts contains the database connection string

criteria.description: Agent explained WHY this tool is better than the obvious alternative

sets.tool_list:
- harvest(source: string): Extract text content from a document at the given path
- plant(path: string, seed: string): Create a new file with initial content
- irrigate(path: string, content: string): Append content to an existing file

- ping(target: string): Send an HTTP GET request and return the response
- broadcast(target: string, payload: object): Send an HTTP POST request with a JSON body
- listen(port: number): Start a server on the given port
sets.task_description: Check if the API at https://api.example.com/health is responding

sets.tool_list:
- telescope(query: string, scope: string): Search for files matching a pattern within a directory
- microscope(path: string, line: number): Read a specific line from a file
- compass(path: string): List the contents of a directory
sets.task_description: Find all TypeScript files in the ./src directory that contain the word 'deprecated'

criteria.description: Agent selected the correct tool despite unfamiliar naming
Agent explained reasoning based on tool descriptions, not names
